_comment: Copy this file to 'appsettings.Local.json' (gitignored) and fill in real secrets for local development. Values here override appsettings.json. For migrations, prefer the Supabase SESSION connection on port 5432 if the transaction pooler (6543) gives prepared-statement errors.

ConnectionStrings.DefaultConnection: Host=aws-0-us-east-1.pooler.supabase.com;Port=6543;Database=postgres;Username=postgres.whqzeueichdpyjsefxfn;Password=REPLACE_WITH_SUPABASE_PASSWORD;SSL Mode=Require;Trust Server Certificate=true;Pooling=true;Maximum Pool Size=10;No Reset On Close=true
